# Clungiverse Visual Aesthetics Research

## Current State Assessment

### Rendering Architecture
The game uses a single HTML5 canvas with a camera transform system (`canvas.ts`). The render pipeline is:

1. Clear canvas to `#0a0a0a` (near-black)
2. Push camera transform (zoom + translate)
3. Render dungeon tiles (`dungeon-renderer.ts`)
4. Render AoE zones, enemies, players, projectiles (`entity-renderer.ts`)
